items.title: 4 dead in pile-up crash involving over 30 vehicles, including multiple semis: Police
items.description: The incident occurred around 10 a.m. local time on southbound I-25, about 40 miles south of Colorado Springs, authorities said.

items.title: WATCH:  Florida man rescues mom, 3 kids from canal, reunited one week later
items.description: Casey Curtis pulled a family from a submerged SUV in Indiantown. One week later, he met them again as they thanked their hero.
